construct_verdict_reason: All three items directly measure the physical material composition of core structural elements (walls, roof, floor) that collectively indicate structural adequacy and habitability.

items.reason: Directly measures wall material quality, a primary structural component of dwelling habitability.
Directly measures roof material quality, a primary structural component essential for weather protection and structural integrity.
Directly measures floor material quality, a primary structural component indicating habitability and material precariousness.
